domain: Bedouin bayt al-sha'r — goat-hair black tent (Arabian/Sahara nomad dwelling; coarse weave loose in dry heat for convection cooling; fibers swell on rain to seal; pole-rope-canvas tension actively adjusted per pitch + side curtains raised/lowered for adaptive ventilation)
specific_mechanism: SLACK-TENSION-NULL: orthogonal null-space LoRA adapter with adaptive slack parameter σ controlling the *width* of the null-space tube. (1) LoRA update ΔW = AB^T constrained to lie in approximate null-space of pretrained W via projector P_null(ΔW) = (I − UU^T)ΔW(I − VV^T) where U,V top singular directions of W. (2) Slack width σ ≥ 0 relaxes strict orthogonality: actual constraint ||P_null⊥(ΔW)||_F ≤ σ. (3) σ scheduled per-layer or learned: large σ when data is in-distribution (open pores → faster adaptation); small σ when OOD/adversarial pressure detected (closed pores → preserve prior knowledge). (4) After each gradient step, Riemannian Stiefel projector restores ΔW into the σ-tube (tension rope re-stake). (5) Combined with LoRA-Subtraction Drift-Resistant-Space objective.
llm_application: SLACK-TENSION-NULL: adaptive null-space LoRA fine-tuning with learned σ-tube. Differs from LoRA-Null 2503.02659 (strict null-space init, no adaptive σ), NULL-LORA 2512.15233 (scaling-vector alignment, no σ tube), CLoRA ACL 2025 (orthogonal regularization on pre-defined subspace, no adaptive width), LoRA-Subtraction 2503.18985 Drift-Resistant Space (uses LoRA- to handle drift but no σ-tube and no Stiefel rope-restore). Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT-NULL (weft-warp twin null-tracks, not σ-tube relaxation), R427 ULI-EPHEMERAL (time-decay half-life schedule, not slack-tension), R441 BOGOLAN-FERMENT-NEG (sign-negative projection, not null-space tube) by ADAPTIVE σ-TUBE WIDTH SCHEDULE + STIEFEL ROPE-RESTORE.
novelty_claim: LoRA-Null + NULL-LORA + CLoRA + LoRA-Subtraction cover orthogonal-null-space LoRA paradigm. SLACK-TENSION-NULL adds (a) σ-controlled null-space tube width + (b) σ scheduled by data-distribution drift detection + (c) Riemannian Stiefel rope-restore projection post-step. Recombination — Stiefel projectors are mainstream.
content_words: coarse weave loose dry heat convection
fibers swell rain pores close watertight
